title: Analyse and reduce volumetric render pass CPU cost
description: The volumetric rendering pass has high CPU time. Investigate whether there are unnecessary performance bottlenecks (redundant work, poor batching, avoidable per-frame allocations, dispatch/setup overhead). Where a safe win exists, optimise it; otherwise produce an analysis document describing the cost breakdown and why the current cost is justified. No frame-time regression is allowed regardless of outcome.
acceptance_criteria: Volumetric pass CPU cost is profiled and the breakdown is documented
Any identified safe optimisation is applied, or a written rationale explains why not
cpu_frame_time_avg shows no regression vs baseline on Sandbox/Vulkan
